prompt: A young male adventurer with messy short black hair, determined dark eyes, wearing a long dark blue coat, a sword sheathed on his left hip, and brown leather boots, sits alone at a wooden table in a dimly lit adventurer's guild hall. Wooden chairs, quest notices covering the walls, candlelight flickering. Other adventurers laugh in the background, ignoring him. He stares at a yellowed quest paper, slowly clenches his fist, then stands up with resolve. Genshin Impact 3D cel-shaded animation style, warm candlelight side-lighting, cinematic composition, fantasy adventure atmosphere. No subtitles, no text overlay, no slow motion.

A young male adventurer with messy short black hair, determined dark eyes, wearing a long dark blue coat billowing in the wind, a sword on his left hip, and brown leather boots, climbs a steep rocky cliff path. Clouds and mist swirl around. Massive ancient ruins visible in the distance. Sunset light breaks through cloud gaps. Small rocks crumble beneath his feet. He reaches a platform, looks up at the distant ruins, his tense expression transforms into awe and excitement. Genshin Impact 3D cel-shaded animation style, epic landscape, cinematic wide-to-medium shot, fantasy adventure atmosphere. No subtitles, no text overlay, no slow motion.

A young male adventurer with messy short black hair, wearing a slightly torn dark blue coat, sweat and dust on his forehead, bright determined eyes, walks toward a glowing blue magic circle at the center of a vast ancient ruin plaza. Massive stone pillars surround him. Blue light illuminates the entire space. He reaches out to touch the light pillar, blue energy surrounds his whole body, he rises from the ground, coat and hair floating, arms spread wide as power awakens. Genshin Impact 3D cel-shaded animation style, dramatic blue lighting, cinematic low-angle to wide shot, fantasy power awakening. No subtitles, no text overlay, no slow motion.
